name: Bench Press Dumbbells
note: Flat bench with dumbbells. 4×5 @ 28kg. Rest 3min between sets.

name: Pull-ups (Bodyweight)
note: 4×8-10 reps. Rest 90sec between sets. Add weight via belt if progressing.

name: Overhead Press Smith Machine
note: 3×8 @ 40kg. Rest 90sec between sets. Weight added per side.

name: Dips (Weighted)
note: 3×8-10. Add weight (vest or belt) when 10 reps feels solid. Rest 60sec.

name: Kettlebell Swings
note: 3 rounds × 15 reps @ moderate weight. Rest 90sec between rounds.
